## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss integration of newsletter into GrowthX's work for Datagrid and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Datagrid wants to launch a monthly newsletter, potentially increasing to bi-weekly](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Content to include product updates, industry news, customer spotlights, and event recaps](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [GrowthX will create design templates and help structure content](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Newsletter to be sent via HubSpot; logistics to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Topics

### Newsletter Scope and Content

  - [Monthly cadence to start, potentially bi-weekly in future](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Focus on Datagrid product updates and new features](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Include industry news, AI developments, and thought pieces](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Highlight customer stories and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Incorporate event recaps and upcoming event announcements](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

### Content Resources and Strategy

  - [Kaitlin has existing content for customer stories and events](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Need to gather product documentation and support ticket data](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Aim to announce both retroactive and upcoming product features](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Alternate between product-focused and industry/case study content](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Design and Structure

  - [GrowthX to create design templates for review](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Outline newsletter structure for consistent format](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Incorporate pull quotes and metrics from case studies](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Consider animated elements for web version](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Operational Details

  - [Target first newsletter launch for early November](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Use HubSpot for email distribution](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Explore options for GrowthX to access HubSpot for content input](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Discuss potential API integration if building emails externally](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Contract and Scope Clarification

  - [Newsletter to be included in existing scope of work](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [No additional cost; contract to be updated to annual engagement](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kaitlin to send existing documentation, case studies, and product feature list](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [GrowthX to create outline and design templates for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Explore HubSpot access and integration options for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting for Friday, October 18th](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [GrowthX to connect with Datagrid's product team for feature details](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Kaitlin to pull support ticket data for content prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/BzX8uyj8mrwzSWEDkwxidxyA4qVFbsiW?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
